name: Cheddar-Olive Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the grated Cheddar cheese, sliced pimento-stuffed olives, and mayonnaise together until well combined.
2. Slice the French bread horizontally into thick slices.
3. Spread the mixture onto the cut surface of each slice of bread.
4. Place the slices on a baking sheet.
5. Bake at 350 degrees F for 20 to 30 minutes, or until lightly golden and heated through.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before slicing into thick pieces.
7. Serve hot.
